Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The sample data shows a consistent pattern across two cases which helps identify repetitive phases I notice events naturally cluster into distinct stages based on purpose resources and temporal proximity

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Material Preparation all events involve handling and positioning the raw metal sheet before any transformation Assembly groups toolrelated and welding actions performed by operators Quality Control focuses on measurement and inspection activities Surface Finishing combines coating and drying steps

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The justification should link each grouping to manufacturing logic not just temporal order but also resource types and functional goals

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Naming should be industrystandard yet clear to nonexperts The output format needs to be structured but not overly technical balancing detail with readability I will avoid overcomplicating the rationale since the sample is straightforward
